# Code of Conduct

## Our Standards

This is a small community wiki project. We expect contributors to:

- Be respectful and constructive in issues and discussions
- Stick to wiki-related topics (game mechanics, recipes, mob data, translations)
- Provide sources or reasoning when correcting data

## Unacceptable behavior

- Harassment or personal attacks
- Spam or off-topic content

## Enforcement

Violations may result in removal from the project. Contact the maintainer via a GitHub issue or Discord.
